downstream_consumers: .coderef/graph.json + validation-report.json consumers (MCP server tools, rag-index gate, LLOYD)

risks.title: Over-resolution: membership fix maps a specifier to a file that is not actually the import target
risks.mitigation: Extension-mapping restricted to exact basename match (.js -> .ts/.tsx in same resolved dir); failing-test-first with positive and negative cases

risks.title: Validation-report count churn breaks locked-schema tests/baselines
risks.mitigation: Counts are data not schema; refresh docs/SCHEMA.md baseline table in the same phase; 12-field shape untouched

risks.title: Rolling phases stall after Phase 1 (deferred plans never authored)
risks.mitigation: hard_stops approved=false force explicit per-phase planning; stubs carry full evidence + operator rulings

decision_records.decision: Rolling plan (1 planned + 3 deferred phases) instead of 4 separate WOs
decision_records.rationale: All four stubs share the PHASE-2.UNRESOLVED-EDGE-AUDIT roadmap node and the same evidence base; one program WO keeps the audit context and close ceremony unified
